name: Post Fiat
description: Post Fiat is an XRP-derived network for capital markets and collective intelligence. It keeps fast XRPL-style settlement, adds published validator selection and privacy-enabled workflows, and uses Task Node plus validator participation to build an auditable coordination layer for AI-assisted financial workflows.
high_level_differentiators: Published validator-selection research instead of opaque validator-list discretion
Privacy-enabled workflows on an XRPL-derived stack
Capital-markets and collective-intelligence framing rather than a generic payments pitch

faq.question: What is Post Fiat?
faq.answer: Post Fiat is an XRP-derived network for capital markets and collective intelligence. It keeps fast XRPL-style settlement, adds published validator selection and privacy-enabled workflows, and uses Task Node plus validator participation as the current coordination layer.

faq.question: Is Post Fiat live?
faq.answer: Post Fiat is live on public testnet. It is not represented as a production mainnet.

faq.question: How is Post Fiat different from XRP?
faq.answer: Post Fiat keeps XRPL-style fast settlement and low transaction costs, but emphasizes published validator-selection research, privacy-enabled workflows, and a contributor layer called the Task Node instead of an opaque validator-list process or a generic SWIFT-replacement narrative.

faq.question: What exists today?
faq.answer: Public whitepaper, public validator benchmark, live validator history service, live testnet explorer, Task Node participation surface, community page, and validator setup guide.

faq.question: What is PFT used for?
faq.answer: PFT is the native asset described as coordinating validators, messaging, privacy-enabled workflows, and Task Node participation across the network.
